backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a chat backend with user profiles, conversations, and messages, using role-based access control to restrict operations to authenticated (non-anonymous) users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the Internet Identity authentication feature to its implementing files and components, with high confidence and a single test ID reference.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with the ChatFlow title, Google Fonts preconnect links, and a root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that orchestrates the authentication flow, rendering a loading screen, login page, profile setup modal, or messaging layout based on auth and profile state.
frontend/src/components/ChatHeader.tsx: Sticky chat header component displaying the recipient's avatar, name, and online status alongside placeholder action buttons for search, call, and options.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat area component that renders date-grouped message bubbles with sent/received alignment, auto-scroll, and an empty-state placeholder when no conversation is selected.
frontend/src/components/ContactsList.tsx: Dark sidebar component listing all registered users (excluding the current user) with avatars, online status indicators, and search filtering, and firing a callback on contact selection.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the ChatFlow login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying app features and a login/logout button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Text input component for composing and sending messages in a conversation, supporting Enter-to-send and showing a spinner while the send mutation is pending.
Top-level layout component that combines the contacts sidebar and chat area, managing the active conversation state and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to set a username and status, submitting via the registerUser mutation with inline error display.
Small presentational component that renders a colored dot indicating online or offline status with configurable size.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Displays a user avatar as a colored circle with initials, deterministically deriving the background color from the username string.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, identity persistence, and login/logout state for ICP Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile operations (get, save, register, list) and conversation/message operations, wrapping backend actor calls with caching and invalidation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including WhatsApp-inspired chat-specific color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Inter font, oklch-based CSS variable color mappings for UI and chat-specific tokens, custom border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 5) tracking the WhatsApp-like messaging app's existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and feature IDs for build planning.
